_schema_note: comp-031 parameters. Each parameter cites primary source + tier. Inherits from comp-019 where applicable.

luminal_urate_concentration_uM._note: Range Brian's brief 50-500 uM (colonic post-meal/fed). Miyazaki 2025 baseline jejunal 0.59 uM is the steady-state-fasted floor. Colonic concentrations vary across diet, meal state, and segment. Model bounds sweep over 1-500 uM.
luminal_urate_concentration_uM.source: Miyazaki 2025 PMC11877951 (fasted floor); Brian's brief / comp-019 sensitivity bound (fed range)

uricase_kinetic_priors._uricase_arm: PULSE-style luminal uricase (engineered EcN with HucR-driven urate oxidase)
uricase_kinetic_priors._kcat_note: kcat estimated from specific activity 8.3 U/mg * 60 s/min * (M.W. uricase tetramer ~135 kDa / 4 subunits = 33.75 kDa) -> 8.3 umol/min/mg * 33.75 mg/umol = 280 /min / 60 = ~4.7/s per subunit at pH 8.5. In vivo effective at ~75% pH-correction: ~3.5/s per subunit. Per-tetramer kcat ~14/s. Use 22/s as upper-bound per-subunit estimate consistent with literature variability.

pdb_pathway_kinetics._kcat_source: Liu et al. 2023 Cell (selenium-dependent DOPDH from G. purinilytica, ~412 s-1; sulfur-dependent bovine XOR equivalent ~15 s-1)
pdb_pathway_kinetics._Km_note: Direct DOPDH Km not in corpus. Estimated from sister Mo-Se hydroxylases (XOR-class enzymes have Km for urate in the 10-200 uM range; selenium-dependent variants in C. sporogenes show similar substrate affinities). Mechanistic extrapolation.
pdb_pathway_kinetics._anchor_data: CBT2.0 in vivo (Li 2025 PMID 41070194): hyperuricemic mice plasma UA 463 -> 172 umol/L over 6 weeks (-63%). Use as empirical magnitude anchor.

cbt20_anchor_in_vivo._uncertainty: +/- 0.50x as the corpus tier is single-paper, mouse model. Range 0.31-0.95.
cbt20_anchor_in_vivo.source: Li et al. 2025 Life Metabolism PMID 41070194

human_translation_attenuation._note: Mouse-to-human translation for urate-axis interventions typically 0.3-0.7x mouse effect. Conservative central 0.5.

cbt20_colonization_density_CFU_per_g._note: Brian's brief 10^9-10^11. Standard engineered LBP transient colonization.

butyrate_stoichiometry._note: PDB pathway terminates pyruvate -> fermentation -> acetate + butyrate. C. sporogenes partition strain-dependent. Mechanistic extrapolation from pathway stoichiometry.

colonic_butyrate_background_mM._note: Luminal 5-20 mM on high-fiber diet (corpus-tier wiki/purine-degrading-bacteria.md line 232). Epithelial surface concentration roughly 10% of luminal (mucus + diffusion gradient).

basseville_hdac_threshold._note: Basseville 2012 PMID 22472121 demonstrated Q141K trafficking rescue at 1-5 mM butyrate in cell culture. EC50 modeled at 1 mM with n=2 cooperative Hill function for HDAC inhibition.

abcg2_genotype_relative_function.source: Matsuo 2014 PMID 24940678 + Miyazaki 2025 PMID 40033341 functional classes, inherited from comp-019

compositional_check_interaction._question: Do PULSE uricase and PDB compete for the same scarce luminal urate substrate?
compositional_check_interaction.comp019_finding: Substrate-limited regime: at all tested uricase doses, capacity ratio 32-1300x exceeds substrate flux. Adding a second urate-consuming pathway competes for the same scarce substrate.
compositional_check_interaction._modeling_choice: Model competition explicitly via Michaelis-Menten partition: each arm consumes urate at rate (kcat*E*S)/(Km+S). When both present in same lumen, total consumption rate ~min(supply, sum of capacities). Below substrate saturation (most physiological conditions per comp-019), combined consumption approaches the supply ceiling, not the sum of capacities.
